description.en: Render engineering documents from JSON to self-contained HTML. Component Assembly Styled Templates.
description.zh-CN: 将工程文档从 JSON 渲染为自包含 HTML。Component Assembly Styled Templates。

body.en: Use cast-a-doc to turn source material into structured JSON, then render one self-contained HTML file.
body.zh-CN: 使用 cast-a-doc 将原始材料整理成结构化 JSON，再渲染为一个自包含 HTML 文件。

body.en: Inline CSS, no CDN, no external scripts. Opens in any browser, attaches to email, archives, and publishes to GitHub Pages.
body.zh-CN: 内联 CSS，无 CDN，无外部脚本。可在任意浏览器打开，也适合邮件附件、归档和发布到 GitHub Pages。

body.en: A Codex or Claude Code skill, plus a standalone Python renderer with zero third-party dependencies.
body.zh-CN: 可作为 Codex 或 Claude Code skill 使用，也可作为零第三方依赖的独立 Python 渲染器使用。

text.en: CAST Docs is the document system and brand. cast-a-doc is the skill in this repository: it casts notes, outlines, drafts, and instructions into controlled engineering documents. The JSON is the source. The HTML is the artifact.
text.zh-CN: CAST Docs 是文档系统与品牌。cast-a-doc 是当前仓库里的 skill：它把笔记、提纲、草稿和指令 cast 成受控工程文档。JSON 是源文件，HTML 是产物。

en.text: for both-agent setup, overrides, local renderer setup, and troubleshooting.

zh-CN.text: 优先使用下面的一键安装命令。
查看双 agent 安装、参数覆盖、本地渲染器设置和问题排查。

description.en: Installs or updates cast-a-doc at ~/.codex/skills/cast-a-doc. Codex can then load the same SKILL.md and references/ material.
description.zh-CN: 安装或更新 cast-a-doc 到 ~/.codex/skills/cast-a-doc。Codex 随后可以加载同一份 SKILL.md 和 references/ 资料。

title.en: Install as a Claude Code skill

description.en: Installs or updates cast-a-doc at ~/.claude/skills/cast-a-doc. The skill activates when you ask Claude for an engineering spec, decision record, or self-contained HTML document.
description.zh-CN: 安装或更新 cast-a-doc 到 ~/.claude/skills/cast-a-doc。当你要求 Claude 生成工程规格、决策记录或自包含 HTML 文档时，该 skill 会自动启用。

text.en: Use the component gallery as a block reference and visual acceptance page, not as a writing scenario.
text.zh-CN: 组件大全作为 block 参考和视觉验收页使用，不作为写作场景。

text.en: Inspect every common block, inline mark, table, diff view, diagram, and slider in one page.
text.zh-CN: 在一个页面中查看所有常用 block、富文本标记、表格、diff 视图、图表和滑块。

text.en: Each scenario picks a section order and a set of components that fit a common writing situation. Open any preview to see a rendered example; the matching JSON fixture lives next to it in the repository.
text.zh-CN: 每个场景都会选择适合常见写作情境的章节顺序和组件集合。打开任意预览即可查看渲染示例；对应的 JSON fixture 位于仓库中的相邻位置。

text.en: Tracking down a bug, regression, or anomaly.
Comparing options and recording why one was chosen.
text.zh-CN: 比较多个方案，并记录选择某个方案的原因。

text.en: Aligning multiple teams on scope and ownership.
text.zh-CN: 让多个团队在范围和归属上达成一致。

text.en: Summarizing a long document or set of documents.
text.zh-CN: 总结长文档或一组文档。

text.en: Curating principles or guidelines for reuse.
text.zh-CN: 整理可复用的原则或指南。

text.en: A target repository can add a reviewable .cast-docs/ profile so cast-a-doc remembers team templates, locale defaults, terminology, writing rules, logos, reusable assets, and output directories.
text.zh-CN: 目标仓库可以添加可审查的 .cast-docs/ profile，让 cast-a-doc 记住团队模板、多语言默认值、术语、写作规则、logo、可复用资源和输出目录。

body.en: Project profiles are files in the repository, not hidden agent memory. The current user request always overrides profile defaults.
body.zh-CN: Project profile 是仓库里的文件，不是隐藏的 agent 记忆。当前用户诉求始终优先于 profile 默认值。

blocks.code:
.cast-docs/
  project.json
  preferences.json
  i18n.json
  glossary.json
  writing-style.md
  templates/
  examples/
  assets/
    logo.png
  out/

text.en: Repository-level configuration for templates, i18n, glossary, writing rules, assets, and output path policy.
text.zh-CN: 面向仓库级模板、多语言、术语表、写作规则、资源和输出路径策略的配置设计。

text.en: This repository now carries a cast-a-start planning workspace alongside the renderer implementation. The workspace makes product intent, technical design, TODOs, and change history explicit without replacing the existing README, SKILL, examples, or references.
text.zh-CN: 这个仓库现在在渲染器实现旁边保留了一套 cast-a-start 规划工作区。该工作区显式记录产品意图、技术设计、TODO 和变化历史，同时不替代现有 README、SKILL、示例或 references。

text.en: Product boundary, users, feature plan, interaction model, and open questions.
text.zh-CN: 产品边界、用户、功能规划、交互模型和未决问题。

text.en: Architecture, document model, verification plan, and decision log.
text.zh-CN: 架构、文档模型、验证计划和决策日志。
项目级不确定事项和延后工作。

body.en: Markdown cannot carry callouts, decision matrices, diff blocks, diagram viewers, and controlled tables without per-renderer extensions. Owning the HTML produces consistent output across every viewer.
body.zh-CN: 如果不依赖各渲染器扩展，Markdown 无法稳定承载 callout、决策矩阵、diff block、图表查看器和受控表格。由我们掌控 HTML，才能在所有查看器中得到一致输出。

body.en: Prose to HTML by a model is non-deterministic. Prose to JSON to HTML separates content from rendering, keeps the JSON validatable and diffable, and lets the renderer produce byte-stable output.
body.zh-CN: 模型直接从 prose 生成 HTML 是非确定性的。prose 到 JSON 再到 HTML 可以分离内容和渲染，让 JSON 可校验、可 diff，并让渲染器产出字节稳定的结果。

body.en: Inline CSS, no external assets. The HTML survives being opened in any browser, attached to email, copied to S3, or served from GitHub Pages.
body.zh-CN: 内联 CSS，无外部资源。HTML 可以在任意浏览器打开，作为邮件附件发送，复制到 S3，或通过 GitHub Pages 提供服务。

body.en: Adding a new component, theme, layout, or interaction is config plus an asset file, not a Python branch. Visual and structural rules live in config/. The Python in scripts/ only assembles.
body.zh-CN: 新增组件、主题、布局或交互时，改配置和资源文件即可，而不是增加 Python 分支。视觉和结构规则放在 config/ 中，scripts/ 里的 Python 只负责组装。
